Project MARINA

Before we start tracking

The Project MARINA agent runs in your menu bar. With your consent, it samples a small amount of activity data every 30 seconds and uploads a summary every 5 minutes to your organization’s dashboard.

What we collect

  • The name of the application currently in the foreground (e.g. Code, Safari).
  • Whether you’re actively typing/clicking or your machine has gone idle.
  • Optionally, the foreground window title — off by default. Your team explicitly enables this in Settings if they want it.

What we never collect

  • Screenshots, keystrokes, or any document/file contents.
  • Activity while you have tracking paused.

You stay in control

  • One click in the menu bar pauses tracking. Your manager only sees “paused.”
  • You can revoke this device any time from Settings on the web app.
By accepting you confirm you’re a member of an organization using Project MARINA and have read its policy.
